steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The concrete example after the dash—“a well-executed marketing campaign helped to make Richard Bachman's novel The Regulators the fifth-best-selling novel of 1996”—reveals what type of factor can influence commercial success without guaranteeing it.

steps.title: Match the signal to the word
steps.content: Publicity directly names what a marketing campaign produces: public awareness and visibility. The others are either inherent properties of the book (originality, complexity) or concern its feasibility (practicality), not promotional impact. B is correct.
